{{Infobox character
| name = Aelora
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Aelora]] uses crystal magic.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Aelora]] has a white-armored forearm with a sleek, white console.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Aelora]] is a member of the [[Titan Knights]] and is described as the [[White Knight]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Aelora]]'s magic is used to devise a magical weapon.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
